title: CASEF v0.6.1 common scalar definitions
$comment: Development artifact: not represented as released until the immutable v0.6.1 Git tag exists. Future schemas consume definitions through exact $ref fragments.

stable_identifier.description: Lexical envelope only. Identifiers are case-sensitive, this definition transfers no ownership, and an object-specific schema may narrow the pattern.

authored_version.description: Shared lexical syntax only. Version namespaces remain semantically distinct; matching syntax does not merge ownership or lifecycle.

record_version.description: Positive record-lineage representation only; this is not schema_version.

canonical_timestamp_utc.description: Canonical RFC 3339 UTC lexical form with uppercase T and Z, no offset, and one to nine non-zero-terminated fractional digits when present. JSON Schema enforces lexical form only and does not establish full calendar validity. Leap-second semantics remain deferred; later semantic validation must not silently normalize leap seconds or fabricate precision.

absolute_uri.description: The required scheme pattern prevents relative references and includes a canonical trailing-whitespace guard at true end of input. Consumers must enable Draft 2020-12 URI format checking or perform equivalent URI validation. A valid locator does not establish content correctness or authority.

json_pointer.description: RFC 6901 JSON Pointer lexical syntax with the additional CASEF canonical no-trailing-whitespace and true end-of-input requirements.
